{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crystalized Rib
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10837
|idx=42
|description="We examined the remains of several victims at the site of the mystery explosion. They all showed a condition of skeletal crystalization, which is a typical consequence of arcane damage!"
—Dark Art Investigation
|skill=
|hp=2038
|def=160
|atk=140
|rush=127
|gene1=In Angel Form, {race} HP +800
|gene2=In Angel Form, {race} ATK +80
|gene3=In Angel Form, {race} DEF +80
|gene4=In Angel Form, {race} RUSH +80
|gene7=In Angel Form, {race} HARD +1% (Awakened)
|}}
